productDisplayName: BIBA Women Printed Turquoise Blue Kurta
description: Composition Turquoise blue printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a deep V-neck, multi-coloured placket around the neckline, extending to the chest with embroidery and mirror work, chest placket with crystal buttons, short sleeves with multi-coloured bands on the cuffs and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water Do not bleach Dry in shade Warm iron; do not iron on decorations The placket on this kurta from biba is decorated with beautiful and subtly stylish mirror work. Wear this over leggings or over trousers depending on the occasion. Smart enough to wear to the office or to a formal party, dress this kurta up by wearing bold earrings and bangles. Model statistics The product is a size 36 on a model of height 5'8" and chest 33"
